title.en: After stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian returned t...

content.en:
After a long time, Ye Tian absorbed a huge amount of energy and finally completed the breakthrough completely.

This moment.

Ye Tiancai can be regarded as the time when he has truly reached the half-step sixfold origin ancestor realm, and his strength far exceeds the peak of the fivefold origin ancestor.

After stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian returned to the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

"Congratulations to the Endless Holy Ancestor!"

After sensing Ye Tian's breath, the Void Tooth Holy Gate congratulated.

"Congratulations to the Endless Holy Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Holy Ancestor!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Holy Ancestor!"

One after another, the fivefold ancestors congratulated.

At this moment, they were all extremely envious, Ye Tian had hit the half-step Sixfold Ancestor in such a short period of time, and it was a one-time success, it was simply too demonic!

Everyone knows the difficulty of the five-fold primordial ancestor peak to impact the half-step six-fold primordial ancestor, and many of the five-fold peak primordial ancestors in the Shangling Origin Domain have failed, and they have failed again and again, and the probability of becoming a half-step sixfold primordial ancestor is getting lower and lower.

Now, those five-fold primordial ancestor peak powerhouses only hoped that they could obtain treasures that would help break through the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor, so that they could hope to become half-step sixfold primordial ancestors.

Compared to Ye Tianyi, the other Fivefold Peak Ancestors were simply too wasteful!

And soon, the news that Ye Tian had broken through to become a half-step sixfold origin ancestor spread throughout the entire Shangling Origin Domain.

......

Nine Lights Holy Gate.

The Dawn Saint Ancestor was also extremely shocked when he got Ye Tian's successful breakthrough to become a half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor.

"The Endless Saint Ancestor actually became a half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor one step ahead of me, this speed is too fast!"

The Dawn Saint Ancestor was shocked.

At the beginning, when he was about to break through to a half-step sixfold ancestor, Ye Tiancai was a fourfold ancestor.

Now, Ye Tian has broken through to a half-step sixfold ancestor, and he is still the peak of a fifth-fold ancestor.

However, with a few more years of the Origin Domain Era, he could impact the half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm, and the success rate was definitely above seven or eighty percent.

However, even if he became a half-step sixfold ancestor, he was far from being Ye Tian's opponent, but his cultivation was equal, and his strength was completely unequal.

Now, with Ye Tian becoming a half-step sixfold ancestor, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor has already become the first holy gate of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain.

As long as Ye Tian didn't die one day, no fivefold holy gate could shake the status of the Void Fang Holy Gate.

Soon after, the Void Tooth Holy Gate hosted a vast feast, inviting many of the Fivefold Ancestors.

And this feast also announced the status of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, even if it was less than the four half-step sixfold ancestors of the Upper Spirit Holy Gate, but the Upper Spirit Holy Gate still did not dare to provoke the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Of course, Ye Tian also needs to have a fight to declare his invincible combat power.

As for his previous killing of the Taihan Holy Ancestor, this matter was not known to the outside world, so he still lacked a real battle record.

After the feast began, the Holy Ancestor of the Holy Gate of the Upper Spirit also came.

Ye Tian said directly: "Shangling Holy Ancestor, I have just broken through to become a half-step sixfold ancestor, and I don't have a clear understanding of my own strength, can I learn a thing or two." "

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor's face changed, he knew that Ye Tian might challenge him, but if it really happened, he was still a little afraid.

Although he had already slashed the thirty-three layers of the Will Pagoda and fused the thirty-three will clones, his strength was already at the peak level of the top half-step sixfold ancestor.

However, he still didn't have the confidence to face the Endless Saint Ancestor Ye Tian.

This is a terrifying demon who has comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths, has several supreme natal primordial control techniques, and can fight head-on with the top half-step six-fold primordial ancestor Taihan Saint Ancestor in the middle of the fivefold primordial ancestor!

Now, Ye Tian is already a half-step sixfold ancestor, how terrifying his strength should be!

However, he could not be timid and admit defeat.

So, the Upper Spirit Saint Ancestor said, "Okay, then I'll have a discussion with the Endless Saint Ancestor!"

Primordial Black Sea.

Ye Tian and the Upper Spirit Saint Ancestor came here, and only here could support the battle of the two half-step Sixfold Origin Ancestors, if they fought in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, the damage would be too great!

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian said.

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor directly sacrificed all his defenses, and then he killed Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian gathered the golden light in his hand, and with a finger, he concentrated the power of the endless golden light on one point.

Burst!

All the Dao in the underworld seemed to have been pierced, this was a power that surpassed everything, and the speed was too fast for the Holy Ancestor of the Upper Spirit to react. 、

In an instant, the defenses of the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor were penetrated, and the body of the Primordial Ancestor was also pierced.

But at the critical moment, Ye Tian kept his hand.

But even so, the Spiritual Ancestor was still hit hard.

"I can't even block a move!"

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor had a gloomy face.

He knew that he was not Ye Tian's opponent, but he didn't expect the gap to be so big!

"I throw in the towel!"

Shangling Holy Ancestor Dao.

Now.

The five-fold ancestors of the Shangling Origin Domain and those half-step six-fold ancestors were all dumbfounded, this difference in strength was too big!

The Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor is also the first half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and he can't even stop the Endless Saint Ancestor's move!

Ye Tiancai has just broken through to a half-step sixfold ancestor!

"The Endless Saint Ancestor is truly invincible at the half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor level!"

Many original ancestors secretly said.

And this battle also completely established Ye Tian's invincible combat power, and the other half-step sixfold ancestors recognized the status of the Void Tooth Holy Gate one after another.

Next, the Void Fang Holy Gate became the First Holy Gate of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and it was already irresistible!

This moment.

The Ancestors of the Upper Spirit Holy Gate looked a little helpless, after all, the Upper Spirit Holy Gate has always been the first Holy Gate of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, but now this position has been handed over, and it is still given to the sixth Void Tooth Holy Gate that has become a fivefold Holy Gate!

......

After the feast was over, Ye Tian went into retreat again.

He had just broken through to become a half-step sixfold ancestor, and he had only fused one will clone, and then he had to use the Extreme Dao Slashing Technique to cut off his own layers of will pagodas, and continue to condense into a special will clone and fuse with his body.

A half-step sixfold ancestor fuses nine will clones to be qualified to impact the sixfold primordial ancestor realm.

However, fusing nine will clones is only a minimum requirement, for example, the Upper Spirit Holy Ancestor has fused thirty-three will clones, and there is still no hope of becoming a sixfold ancestor.

Ye Tian's goal was still to fuse the three hundred and sixty-five will clones and cut off all the will pagodas.

In this way, he was in the most perfect state to impact the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Realm.

However, it was very difficult to cut off all the Pagoda of Will layers, and many of the Sixfold Ancestors had not achieved this step, and they were all imperfect state breakthroughs.

It's not that they don't want to break through perfectly, it's that it's too difficult, and the hope of breaking through the Sixfold Ancestor has arrived, so naturally they can only give up breaking through in a perfect state.
